description: Fix verdict logic to account for high-severity risks, add report identity header with repo/question metadata, remove duplicate score display, and rename 'Agent Agreement' section to 'Review Confidence'.
steps: 1. Update deriveVerdict to accept risks array and never return 'Ready to ship' when high-severity risks exist; multiple medium risks should also warn.
2. Add optional config prop (SessionConfig) to ResultsDashboardProps and display repo metadata in the top summary card if available.
3. Remove the duplicate score/100 text display that appears alongside the ScoreRing.
4. Rename 'Agent Agreement' section title to 'Review Confidence'.
5. Update unit tests if needed to account for the new deriveVerdict signature.
acceptance_criteria: deriveVerdict never returns 'Ready to ship' when high-severity risks exist
Multiple medium risks produce a warning verdict even with high confidence
Optional config prop shows repository info when present, nothing when absent
No duplicate score/100 text alongside the ScoreRing
Section title reads 'Review Confidence' instead of 'Agent Agreement'
Export button remains visible and working
verification: npm run build exits with code 0
npm run lint exits with code 0
npm run test -- src/components/workspace/__tests__/ui-logic.test.ts exits with code 0
